title: If Statements & Control Flow
description: Learn how to make decisions in your code with if, else if, and else statements.

blocks.title: Simple If Statement
If...Else Practice
Grade Calculator
If Statements Quiz
blocks.description: Test your understanding of if, else if, and else statements.

questions.question: What does this code output? let x = 10; if (x > 5) { console.log("big"); } else { console.log("small"); }
questions.explanation: Since x (10) is greater than 5, the if condition is true, so "big" is logged.

questions.question: How many branches can an if statement have?
options: As many else if statements as needed
If, one else, and no else if
questions.explanation: You can have one if, any number of else if statements, and an optional else.
